title: calcitrapa furfuracea
intro: Calcitrapa furfuracea, also known as the prickly purslane or purslane, is a succulent plant that belongs to the family Portulacaceae. This plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Calcitrapa furfuracea include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in the form of teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
